case.title: BARNES v. COLUMBIA BROADCASTING SYSTEM, INC.

opinion.h1: BARNES v. COLUMBIA BROADCASTING SYSTEM, INC., 355 U.S. 608 (1958)
opinion.h4: BARNES v. COLUMBIA BROADCASTING SYSTEM, INC. APPEAL FROM THE UNITED STATES DISTRICT COURT FOR THE NORTHERN DISTRICT OF ILLINOIS. No. 226, Misc. Decided March 3, 1958.
opinion.p: Louis M. Mantynband and Le Roy R. Krein for appellee.

355 U.S. 608 GOSTOVICH v. VALORE, ADJUDICATION OFFICER, VETERANS ADMINISTRATION. APPEAL FROM THE UNITED STATES DISTRICT COURT FOR THE WESTERN DISTRICT OF PENNSYLVANIA. No. 247, Misc. Decided March 3, 1958.
Solicitor General Rankin, Assistant Attorney General Doub and Samuel D. Slade for appellee.
